violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
The condensate from the expresso machine unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Application provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Classic chicken empanadas were observed held at 118-120 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. -PIC elected to voluntarily dispose of the empanadas during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets at the 1 door Grista lowboy observed in poor repair. Gaskets shall be repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
The condensate from the expresso machine unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025
The middle compartment of the three compartment sink is in poor repair (lever not attached and plug/stopper not sealing). New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
